strategy.description: Hyper-local niche dominance strategy focusing on 'Armenian-Georgian' specialty keywords to differentiate from generic Mediterranean competitors while capturing high-intent traffic for unique culinary offerings like Khinkali and Khachapuri.
focusAreas: Niche Culinary Keyword Optimization (Khinkali, Khachapuri, Mangal)
Local SEO & Geo-Targeted Landing Pages (Carmichael, Arden-Arcade, Sacramento)

strategy.rationale: Yerevan Sac occupies a unique market gap; while competitors focus on generic Mediterranean staples, Yerevan Sac can dominate search results for specific Caucasian dishes that have high curiosity and low keyword difficulty, effectively siphoning traffic from broader competitors through specialized authenticity.
